violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The following was observed in poor repair: 1. gaskets for 2 door lowboy 2. gaskets for walk-in cooler 3. base of faucet at handsink New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024

The condensate from the ice machines are draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain or other appropriate manner. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. Dumpster lid was also observed opened. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The floors under equipment and the fanguards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
